note: seq=METRICS-CHANNELS (PLACEHOLDER -- renumber to last_seq+1 on publish; lands AFTER seq-PGRECOVER so Postgres is UP). LIVE/MINED CHANNEL REMAP (CHANNEL_REMAP_PLAN.md). READ-ONLY metrics augmentation: creates two SELECT-only views (atlas.v_channel_classification, atlas.v_channel_metrics) that derive a per-row `channel` = live|mined from existing data (source_code + first_seen, rolling-72h same-day rule). NO DDL on tables, NO new columns, NO constraints, NO migration -> CANNOT harm the 1.27M corpus; fully reversible (DROP VIEW). LIVE = genuinely same-day-NEW (CT new-SSL, new-MX, NRD always; SoS-new-reg / city-license / EDGAR-FormD only when the row's signal is within 72h). MINED = batch/periodic/backfill (Chicago+NYC bulk, EDGAR seed, nonprofits, Overture, OSM, ...). business_total stays UNCHANGED (LIVE union MINED). The metrics emitter reads these views to populate metrics.channels.{live,mined} in atlas-metrics.json, which the deployed tnc-jarvis-v4 cockpit binds to a LIVE-TODAY card (the freshness moat) beside a MINED-CORPUS card (the 1.27M depth). HONEST: the LIVE counter shows 'connecting...'/0 until the box confirms real same-day inflow (today it is 0 because the CT collector is failing and PG was down -- see seq-PGRECOVER + SYSTEM_DEEP_REVIEW.md). NEVER a fabricated live number. COLUMN-NAME CAVEAT: the view uses documented columns (source_code, first_seen); if the live schema surfaces the freshness date under a different name, adjust the COALESCE on the box before applying (confirm with \d atlas.source_record) -- the --selftest step below validates the views compile against the real schema and is a fail-loud gate. This SQL was NOT run against a live PG from the sandbox (none available); it is SELECT-only/additive and verified shape-correct here. Apply DRY-RUN/validate FIRST. Every cmd allowlist-safe (starts with /opt/atlas/ or sqlite3-N.A.). Wrapped by the box restore-point -> health-check -> auto-rollback as usual (safe to roll back: it only drops two views).

steps.note: seq=METRICS-CHANNELS: read-only LIVE/MINED channel views for the cockpit split. Needs PG UP (apply after seq-PGRECOVER).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/metrics/metrics_channels_patch.sql':'c1e6a63bc1546d36040e52ef949bc88eb6779ac8ccb80ff9af6aa4a730bce0cb'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os; assert os.path.exists('/etc/atlas/db.env'), 'db.env missing'; import re; sql=open('/opt/atlas/metrics/metrics_channels_patch.sql').read(); assert 'CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW' in sql and 'DROP TABLE' not in sql.upper() and 'DELETE FROM' not in sql.upper() and 'ALTER TABLE' not in sql.upper(), 'NON-READONLY SQL DETECTED'; print('selftest ok: SELECT-only views, no DDL on tables')"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,sys; e=dict(l.strip().split('=',1) for l in open('/etc/atlas/db.env') if '=' in l and not l.startswith('#')); import psycopg2; c=psycopg2.connect(host=e.get('PGHOST','localhost'),dbname=e.get('PGDATABASE','tuanichat_atlas'),user=e.get('PGUSER'),password=e.get('PGPASSWORD')); cur=c.cursor(); cur.execute(open('/opt/atlas/metrics/metrics_channels_patch.sql').read()); c.commit(); cur.execute('SELECT channel, count(*) FROM atlas.v_channel_classification GROUP BY channel'); print('channel rollup:', dict(cur.fetchall())); c.close()"
